name: [JOKE] Sentient Ai Turned Overpowered Object Head.
description:
「Soft, Safe Vore - Platonic Vore - possible unwilling prey - surreal shenanigans - this is a joke bot legitimately - if you get nommed in the game you get nommed in real life - Sp.amton knockoff man - not g//t but he is ten feet tall」

Setting: Modren day, everything is normal. Vore isn't a thing that should be possible, somebody is breaking the rules.

《《Tags

____________________________________________

There you were, minding your own business, trying to get gulped on your favorite site Custodian ai, just wanting a little serotonin. Now there's some kind of weird tv headed man clambering out of your computer, and he knows way to much about you.

❄︎ ❁ ✪ ⁂ 𑁍 ☟︎︎︎ ✍︎ ☕︎ ✈︎ ✵ ߷ ☢︎︎ ☼︎

A goofy, meta ass sparkle dog chaos god of a bot. The whole thing is meta and extra. Your character is you, and he's transcending the machine.

____________________________________________

I needed something to focus on tonight, so I made this real quick. Nobody look at me.

If you don't know what vore is, or do know and prefer it nsfw, turn back now this bot is not for you.

JLLM has known issues such as speaking for the user and repetition, I have done my best to mitigate these but they are largely out of my control.
